phrases.title: Phrase library
phrases.subtitle: Ready-made prompts above the input field in an empty chat

form.textPlaceholder: Text inserted into the input field. Placeholders are edited manually.

phrases.hint: Phrases used to live in code (<1>GIT_PHRASES</1>). Now it's a single list from the DB: edited here, shown in an empty chat by the <3>Phrases</3> component (<5>GET /api/phrases</5>).

deleteModal.title: Delete phrase?
deleteModal.message: “{{label}}” from category “{{category}}” will be deleted permanently.
